reviews.comment:
Buen servicio, empleados muy amables, muy limpio en general, incluso los baños.
Tiene lubricentro y servicio de grúa , esta en el centro sobre la ruta que va a Amaicha
Es del Automóvil Club Argentino y tiene Careteria.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, very friendly employees, very clean overall, even the restrooms. It has a lube center and towing service, and is located downtown on the road to Amaicha. It belongs to the Argentine Automobile Club and has a roadside stand.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3723316147645973523/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRaktXUzNBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy precaria. Encima no le andaba para hacer el descuento de ACA sumado a que tampoco canjeaban puntos Serviclub. Malisima.

(Translated by Google)
Very unreliable. On top of that, it wouldn't even accept the ACA discount, and they didn't accept Serviclub points either. Terrible.
